description: Index of minimal repro fixtures. See README.md for schema and lifecycle.

real_docs_blocked.blocker: Spec 2 entanglement: Word=609.5 Oxi=609.0 gap=-0.5 (not -1.0). Multi-line cell drift cancels half the border overhead. Spec 1 alone would regress this doc by +0.5pt.
Orthogonal short-cell bug: Word=15.0 Oxi=20.5 gap=+5.5 in wrong direction. Not a border-overhead failure.

specs.formula: overhead_pt = top + bot + (num_rows - 1) * insideH    (left/right unused). Layout uses declared OOXML sz value, not COM Border.LineWidth (which snaps to wdLineWidth enum quanta).
blocked_on: Spec 2 (row content drift) must ship together OR find ≥2 more real 1-row docs with content short enough that Spec 2 drift snap-rounds to 0
Implementing Spec 1 alone would regress kyodoken10 by +0.5pt — zero-regression rule says no
specs.spec_2_proposed: table_row_height_drift (R_true ≈ 25.65pt for 10.5pt MS Mincho, snapped to 0.5pt grid; per-row drift accumulates and snaps up roughly every 3-4 rows). Validated across N = 2,3,5,10,20.
specs.notes: Discovery under the new Ra discipline: 1-row formula looked clean (10/10 variants + 2/2 real tables in 683f) but real-doc cross-check on kyodoken10 revealed entanglement with row content drift. Old net-positive rule would have shipped this and silently regressed kyodoken10.
